response.justification: The candidate is an experienced full-stack and polyglot engineer with strong DLang, TypeScript/Node.js, and web platform credentials, but the resume shows no Kotlin experience, no Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate exposure, and only incidental Java work (robotic arms, mobile orchestration). The required deep JVM expertise and enterprise framework background are essentially absent, and the IDE experience is limited to C/C++ contributions to NI LabWindows/CVI over a decade ago. The profile does not align with a Senior IDE/JVM tooling role centered on enterprise Java/Kotlin ecosystems.
strengths: Long track record across complex systems, including low-latency micro-services and developer tooling
Some prior IDE work (NI LabWindows/CVI in C/C++) and language-tooling adjacent projects in DLang
Strong software craftsmanship habits: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, workshops on testing
concerns: No Kotlin experience and only minimal, dated Java exposure — core requirement not met
No demonstrated work with Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or enterprise JVM frameworks
Recent career trajectory is centered on TypeScript/Node and AI tooling, not JVM internals or IDE subsystems

key_factors.factor: Missing Kotlin and deep Java/JVM expertise
Prior IDE-adjacent work and tooling craftsmanship
